widgets_values:
# LTXV-2.3 Model Files & Dependencies

## Diffusion Model
**LTXV-2.3 DEV GGUF Q4_K_M**  
*Place in:* `diffusion_models`

- [ltx-2.3-22b-dev_Q4_K_M.gguf](https://huggingface.co/vantagewithai/LTX-2.3-GGUF/blob/main/dev/ltx-2-3-22b-dev-Q4_K_M.gguf)

---

## Distilled LoRA
**LTX-2 19B DISTILLED LORA**  
*Place in:* `loras`

- [ltx-2-19b-distilled-lora](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/resolve/main/loras/ltx-2-19b-distilled-lora_resized_dynamic_fro09_avg_rank_175_fp8.safetensors)

---

## Text Encoder
**Gemma 3 12B (FP4 mixed)**  
*Place in:* `clip`

- [gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/blob/main/split_files/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors)

---

## Dual CLIP Connector
**LTX-2.3 Text Projection Connector (bf16)**  
*Place in:* `clip/text encoders`

- [ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/text_encoders/ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors)

---

## Audio & Video VAE
**LTX-2.3 VAE Files**  
*Place in:* `vae`

- [LTX-2.3 VAE Folder](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/tree/main/vae)

---

## Spatial Upscaler
**LTX-2.3 Spatial Upscaler ×2 (v1.0)**  
*Place in:* `latent_upscale_models`

- [ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/blob/main/ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors)

---

## - [ComfyUI-GGUF](https://github.com/city96/ComfyUI-GGUF) — GGUF Node

## - [ComfyUI-KJNodes](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-KJNodes) — Install or update this node pack to get the Audio/Video VAE node

## - [LTX2.3-MODELS](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/tree/main)

## - [LTX2.3-GGUF](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/LTX-2.3-GGUF/tree/main/distilled)-ALL GGUF VERSIONS


## - [IC-LORA UNION CONTROL](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3-22b-IC-LoRA-Union-Control)-IC LORA LINK
